content.json:
# Identity and sign-in analysis
---
Failed sign-in pressure, targeted accounts, source geography, legacy authentication, and risk events. Requires the Entra ID (SigninLogs) connector; the risk panel additionally uses AADUserRiskEvents when present.

content.query:
SigninLogs
| summarize Failures = countif(ResultType != 0), Successes = countif(ResultType == 0), TargetedAccounts = dcountif(UserPrincipalName, ResultType != 0), SourceIPs = dcountif(IPAddress, ResultType != 0)
| project Metric = pack_array('Failed sign-ins', 'Successful sign-ins', 'Targeted accounts', 'Attacking IPs'), Value = pack_array(Failures, Successes, TargetedAccounts, SourceIPs)
| mv-expand Metric to typeof(string), Value to typeof(long)
content.title: Identity pressure at a glance

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType != 0
| extend Reason = case(ResultType == 50126, 'Bad password', ResultType == 50053, 'Account locked', ResultType == 50076, 'MFA required', ResultType == 50057, 'Account disabled', 'Other')
| summarize Failures = count() by Reason, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Failed sign-ins over time, by error

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize Failures = count(), DistinctIPs = dcount(IPAddress), Apps = dcount(AppDisplayName), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName
| order by Failures desc
| take 25
content.title: Most-targeted accounts

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize Failures = count(), TargetedAccounts = dcount(UserPrincipalName), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by IPAddress, Location
| order by Failures desc
| take 25
content.title: Top attacking source IPs, with locations

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ClientAppUsed !in ('Browser', 'Mobile Apps and Desktop clients', '')
| summarize Attempts = count() by ClientAppUsed, Outcome = iff(ResultType == 0, 'Success', 'Failure')
| order by Attempts desc
content.title: Legacy authentication, by client app (should trend to zero)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true (AADUserRiskEvents | project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, RiskEventType, RiskLevel, Source), (print TimeGenerated = datetime(null), UserPrincipalName = '', RiskEventType = '', RiskLevel = '', Source = '' | where 1 == 0)
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize Events = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName, RiskEventType, RiskLevel
| order by Events desc
| take 25
content.title: Entra risk detections (empty without Identity Protection data)
